use_cases: Hero section background with interactive fluid particle effects for SaaS landing pages
Decorative mouse-following animation for creative portfolio websites
Engagement-focused visual element for marketing and demo pages
Ambient background effect with particle density customization
ai_summary: An interactive canvas-based particle system that creates fluid, mouse-responsive animations. Particles flow toward the cursor and can be blasted away on click, with customizable density, size, and colors. Designed as a decorative visual effect for hero sections, backgrounds, or engagement-focused UI elements in SaaS and creative applications.
